# viettelidc_vks_backup_record (Resource)

Provides a VKS Backup Record resource to manage manual block storage backups.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Táº¡o Manual Backup Record 
resource "viettelidc_vks_backup_record" "instant_backup" {
  volume_id  = 255
  cluster_id = 1477
  host_id    = 6
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `cluster_id` (Number) The ID of the K8s cluster.
- `volume_id` (Number) The ID of the block storage volume to backup.

### Optional

- `host_id` (Number) ID of the host. If not set, inherits from provider config.
- `plan_type` (String) Plan type, default is `k8s`.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) Creation time of the backup record.
- `id` (String) The ID of the manual backup record.
- `name` (String) The name of the snapshot backup.
- `size` (Number) Size of the backup snapshot.
- `status` (String) Status of the manual backup record.
